mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_diet WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT name AS name, AVG(kcal) AS avgKcal, AVG(protein_g) AS avgProteinG, AVG(carb_g) AS avgCarbG, AVG(fat_g) AS avgFatG, COUNT(*) AS hitCount FROM t_diet WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 AND name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' AND occurred_at >= #{from} AND occurred_at <= #{to} GROUP BY name ORDER BY hitCount DESC, name ASC LIMIT #{limit}
